home.description: Software Engineer with a hybrid profile: solid Full Stack development experience combined with expert analytical skills in Data, BI and automation. I build digital products that create impact.
home.aboutDescription: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience and a unique hybrid profile: combining the power of Full Stack development (Spring Boot, Angular, Node.js, Flutter) with expert command of Data & BI (SQL Server, Power BI with DAX, Excel VBA). Founder of Equasoft and developer at the Ministry of Human Development. I've optimized financial systems, built social platforms, led academic projects, and created business intelligence solutions that turn data into decisions. I'm passionate about translating complex problems into digital products that generate real impact.

python.title: Databases and SQL for Data Science with Python

fullstack.title: Angular & Spring Boot: Full Stack
fullstack.description: Angular 17 (components, routes, services, Redux) | Spring Boot 3 (Spring Security, JWT, JPA/Hibernate) | Implementation of solutions like real-time chat (WebSocket) | Shopping carts and CRUD with RESTful APIs | Integrating pagination and advanced state management | Deployment on AWS (EC2, RDS, S3) following optimal security and performance practices.

OSRM routing to calculate alternative routes avoiding reported incidents
Push notifications for real-time alerts to nearby drivers

blogs.title: Tech Blog
blogs.subtitle: Reflections, tutorials and lessons learned along the way

microservices.title: Microservices Architecture with Spring Boot and Angular
microservices.description: How I designed and implemented a financial microservices architecture at Recycob: communication patterns, distributed transaction handling, and lessons learned integrating Spring Boot with Angular in production.

ecuaroad.title: Building Ecua Road: Lessons from a Startup
ecuaroad.description: The journey of creating Equasoft and launching Ecua Road: from the idea of a real-time road incident notification system to having WebSockets in production with Google Maps and OSRM. Mistakes, pivots and learnings.

powerbi.title: Power BI and DAX: Data Storytelling for Non-Technical Audiences
powerbi.description: The difference between a dashboard that informs and one that drives decisions. Advanced DAX techniques, star schema data modeling, and how I presented KPIs for the Jóvenes en Acción project to Ministry stakeholders.

flutter.title: Flutter + Clean Architecture + BLoC in Production
flutter.description: Why we chose Clean Architecture with the BLoC pattern for POOL and how we scaled the university app to thousands of users. Layer structure, complex state management and unit tests in Flutter.

devops.title: DevOps with Docker, Azure and CI/CD Pipelines
devops.description: From manual deployment to continuous delivery: how I configured Docker Compose, automated deployments on Azure with CI/CD pipelines and reduced production errors by 80% on the Ammeno project.
